{#- Override sphinx_rtd_theme/breadcrumbs.html. The RTD breadcrumb is hidden site-wide via CSS; in its place we render a small "Blog" section banner on every page under the blog path, as a visual signal that the visitor is in the blog area. Nothing renders here on the main docs pages. -#} {%- set in_blog = pagename == ablog.blog_path or pagename.startswith(ablog.blog_path ~ '/') %} {%- if in_blog %}
Blog
Releases, deep dives, war stories
RSS
{%- endif %}
